message:
fix(core): GROUP BY numeric index resolution and expression conformance oracle

GROUP BY 1, GROUP BY 2 etc. now correctly resolve to the corresponding
result column expression (e.g. GROUP BY 1 groups by the first SELECT
column). Previously numeric indices were treated as literal values.

Added comprehensive expression conformance oracle test (28 queries)
covering scalar min/max NULL, ORDER BY alias, CASE in GROUP BY,
IN subquery, compound SELECT, LIKE/GLOB, arithmetic edge cases,
string functions, and more.

Tests: 1579 core pass (+7), 0 fail, clippy+fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
